zh.lifeSummary: 當Renaud II de Saint Valéry於大約1094年出生在英國英格蘭米德萊可易斯列沃斯時，他的父親Bernard III de St Valéry31歲，母親Mathilda St John28歲。他至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1166年8月5日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾霍頓享年73歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾霍頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Renaud II de Saint Valéry于大约1094年出生在英国英格兰米德萊可易斯列沃斯时，他的父亲Bernard III de St Valéry31岁，母亲Mathilda St John28岁。他至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1166年8月5日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾霍頓享年73岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾霍頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saint
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Valéry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Colette, Pierre, Raoul, Yva.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Valery, French form of Latin Valerius (see Valerio ).
Americanized form of Italian   Valerio   or   Valeri  .

variants.name: Vallery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Leonce, Monique.
French:
habitational name from Vallery in Yonne, once a Gallo-Roman estate, recorded in 1218 as Valerianus.

variants.name: Valerio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Ana, Manuel, Pedro, Mario, Luis, Francisco, Ramon, Ruben, Carlos, Jesus.  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Lucio, Francesco, Maurizio, Niccolo, Romeo, Vito, Amadeo, Anastasio, Aureliano, Carmela.

Spanish and Italian: from the personal name Valerio, from Latin Valerius, a Roman surname ultimately derived from Latin valere ‘to flourish, to be strong and healthy’. The name was borne by several early Christian saints, among them 4th-century bishops of Trier and Zaragoza and 5th-century bishops of Sorrento and of Antibes. Compare Valery .

nameMeanings.name: Renaud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanic. See Reynold .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  ♂ ‘Profit’ or ‘sharp’.
2  ♀, ♂ ‘Upright’.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Renaud II de Saint Valéry was born about 1094, in Isleworth, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Bernard III de St Valéry, was 31 and his mother, Mathilda St John, was 28. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 5 August 1166, in Horton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Horton, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Renaud II de Saint Valéry est né environ 1094, à Isleworth, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bernard III de St Valéry, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mathilda St John, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 août 1166, à Horton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Horton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Renaud II de Saint Valéry um 1094 in Isleworth, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernard III de St Valéry 31 und seine Mutter Mathilda St John 28. Er hatte mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. August 1166 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Horton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Horton, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud II de Saint Valéry è nato il circa 1094 nel Isleworth, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Bernard III de St Valéry, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mathilda St John, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 agosto 1166, nel Horton, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Horton, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Renaud II de Saint Valéryが約1094年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスイスルオルスで生まれた時，父Bernard III de St Valéryは31歳，母Mathilda St Johnは28歳であった。彼は少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1166年8月5日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアホールトンで73歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアホールトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Renaud II de Saint Valéry(이)가 대략 1094년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 이슬루르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernard III de St Valéry(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilda St John(은)는 28세였다. 그는 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1166년 8월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 호르턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 호르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud II de Saint Valéry nasceu aproximadamente 1094, em Isleworth, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Bernard III de St Valéry, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mathilda St John, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de agosto de 1166, em Horton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Horton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Renaud II de Saint Valéry родился около 1094 г. в местности исльворт, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Bernard III de St Valéry было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilda St John, 28. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 августа 1166 г. в местности хауртон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности хауртон, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Renaud II de Saint Valéry nació aproximadamente 1094, en Isleworth, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Bernard III de St Valéry, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mathilda St John, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de agosto de 1166, en Horton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Horton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
